body.title: Igor: web API unresponsive, needs diagnosis
body.result: Diagnosed: root cause was Ollama inference stall (341s), not routing. Routing code is sound — live test confirms comms://igor fanout=2, reply in 0.7s. Two follow-on issues filed: channel-mismatch UX (browser in wrong tab) + global incoming queue not filtered by agent_id.
body.intention: I intend that Igor's web interface is responsive and operational.
body.description: Igor is receiving messages intermittently and generating responses, but responses appear only in the tmux console (public feed) — not in the web chat UI (private feed). Server is running. Naming: tmux console = public feed. Web chat window = private feed. Bug: web-chat replies not routed back to web UI. Affected files: devices/igor/web/*, devices/web_server/server.py. Completion criteria: message sent via web chat produces visible response in web chat UI, not just console.
